tickets.title: US001: Student 1
tickets.description:
As a Student,
I want to order food using my phone,
so that I can avoid waiting in long cafeteria lines.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Students can browse the menu
- Orders can be placed through the app
- Order confirmation is displayed after submission

tickets.title: US002: Student 2
tickets.description:
As a Student,
I want to filter menu items by allergies,
so that I can avoid unsafe food options.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Users can select allergy filters
- Unsafe menu items are hidden
- Filters update the menu immediately

tickets.title: US003: Student 3
tickets.description:
As a Student,
I want to receive discount notifications,
so that I can take advantage of cafeteria promotions.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Notifications are sent at scheduled times
- Notifications display discount details
- Users can open the app from the notification

tickets.title: US004: Staff/Admin
tickets.description:
As a Cafeteria Staff Member,
I want to mark menu items as sold out,
so that students cannot order unavailable food.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Staff can mark items as sold out
- Sold out items disappear from ordering
- Changes update immediately for students

tickets.title: US005: Student 4
tickets.description:
As a Kitchen Staff Member,
I want to view incoming orders on a kitchen display,
so that food preparation can begin immediately.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Orders appear in real time
- Orders remain visible during internet outages
- Offline orders sync automatically after reconnection

analysis.ambiguity1: The requirement "reduce the queue" is vague because it does not define measurable targets or how queue reduction should be evaluated.
analysis.ambiguity2: The push notification requirement is ambiguous because it does not specify notification frequency, target users, or whether users can disable notifications.
analysis.conflictSolution: The kitchen display system should support offline operation for up to 10 minutes by storing orders locally and synchronizing automatically once the internet connection is restored.
